description: Evaluates credential management service maturity—lifecycle policies, identity store security, provisioning, deprovisioning, storage processes, and credential custodianship with separation of duties.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: A credential management service exists and is reviewed frequently for efficacy.

capabilities.name: Credential Lifecycle Policy
capabilities.description: Password, certificate age, and credential storage policies are documented, scoped appropriately, and reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Documented password policy for applications, networks, and endpoints
Enterprise-wide vs vertical password policy scope

capabilities.name: Secure Credential Management and storage system (identity store)
capabilities.description: The identity store securely manages credentials with automatic provisioning and deprovisioning and regular efficacy review.
evaluation_focus: Identity store manages and stores credentials securely

capabilities.name: Credential Provisioning Process
capabilities.description: Credential provisioning is formalized, scoped appropriately, reviewed frequently, and automated based on conditions like new user provisioning.

capabilities.name: Credential Deprovisioning Process
capabilities.description: Credential deprovisioning is formalized, scoped appropriately, reviewed frequently, and automated based on conditions like age or compromise.

capabilities.name: Credential Storage Process
capabilities.description: Credential storage is formalized, scoped appropriately, reviewed frequently, and automated based on conditions like age or compromise.

capabilities.name: Credential custodian
capabilities.description: A dedicated credential custodian manages credentials with separation of duties between user creation, authentication, and credential creation.
evaluation_focus: Separation of duties for user, authentication, and credential roles

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
